name: Glycolic Acid
description: An alpha-hydroxy acid (AHA) that dissolves the bonds between dead skin cells.
scientificSummary: Small molecular size allows it to penetrate quickly to loosen dead skin cells, revealing brighter skin beneath.
mechanismOfAction: Small molecular size allows it to penetrate quickly to loosen dead skin cells, revealing brighter skin beneath.

seo.title: Glycolic Acid - Clinical Profile & Compatibility | Dew Theory
seo.description: Discover the scientific benefits, compatibility, and clinical profile of Glycolic Acid in skincare.
